title: Repulsor-compensator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''repulsor-compensator''' was a part of a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]].<ref name="SWG:GbCS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Ground-based Cloaking Shield}} on Corellia</ref> The [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] often flew with a broken one.<ref name="Star Wars: Dark Empire II">''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]''</ref>

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], a shipment of repulsor-compensators was stolen from one of [[Corellian Technologies/Legends|Corellian Technologies]]' [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]]. As these components were needed to fulfill an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] order for [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]], placed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] himself, the company hired an independent strike team to retrieve the shipment.<ref name="SWG:GbCS" />

Repulsor-compensators were also used as component parts of [[servo slipper]]s. They worked with [[muscle stimulator]]s and [[movement servo]]s to allow precise movement in high-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] environments.<ref name="GFT">''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]''</ref>
